symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $462.12 yesterday with pre-market at $474.53. All EMAs above price with EMA200 at $339.47 rising and price near 52-week high of $465.38. Euphoric social sentiment driven by TSMC viewed as irreplaceable AI foundry with structural monopoly on advanced nodes demanded by Nvidia, Apple and others.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSM 전일종가 $462.12 프리마켓 $474.53. 모든 이평선 위 EMA200 $339.47 상승 중 52주 고점 $465.38 인근. 소셜 euphoric 심리 TSMC가 Nvidia Apple 등 첨단 노드에서 구조적 독점 AI 파운드리로 평가.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: NVDA closed at $210.69 with pre-market at $210.92. Price above all EMAs with EMA200 at $188.25 rising and volume contraction near 52-week high of $236.20. Optimistic social sentiment from strong AI infrastructure demand and attractive forward valuation.
